epg.title: Music Video Hits
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

Where mainstream and underground meet. Let's cross over the genres and let yourself be surprised. Because some electronic music tracks cannot be labeled.

epg.title: From The Studio
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

Starsky will be your host/teacher for this From The Studio show. Discover the best electronic music gears and learn how to use them!

epg.title: Clubbing Lifestyle
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

The Clubbing TV team is exploring the world to understand the different sides of the club culture. Interviews, art exhibitions, parties and backstage access with the biggest artists will be part of the trip!

epg.title: Rendez-vous
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

Interviews with the world's famous DJs and producers. Clubbing TV meets with talents of all genres: Big Room stars or underground heroes, legendary or upcoming artist, we got them all on Clubbing TV !

epg.title: The Big Bad Box
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

Our brand new studio show The Big Bad Box will kick off the season this month! One studio, one screen, one guest and 13 minutes to get to know better your favorite artists.

epg.title: Put Your Hands Up
epg.description:
| +12 | Música |

Our reports and aftermovies from electronic music festivals all over the world. Our Clubbing TV teams are travelling all over the world to guide you through those amazing party spots ! Interviews with DJs, clubbers and event organizers, there is no escape from our cameras !
